description: 巴菲特投资金句库 - 69+ 条经典语录

quotes.en: My goal is to outperform the market average over the long term, not to seek short-term暴利.
quotes.zh: 我的目标是追求长期超越市场平均的表现，而不是短期暴利。

quotes.en: It's more important to outperform in a bear market than to do well in a bull market.
quotes.zh: 在熊市中跑赢大盘，比在牛市中表现良好更重要。

quotes.en: The real test of investing is how you perform in a bear market.
quotes.zh: 真正的投资测试是在熊市中表现如何。

quotes.en: Market volatility is the friend of the rational investor.
quotes.zh: 市场波动是理性投资者的朋友。

quotes.en: Rule No.1: Never lose money. Rule No.2: Never forget rule No.1.
quotes.zh: 第一条规则：不要亏损。第二条规则：记住第一条。

quotes.en: When a fine company encounters a temporary huge problem, it's often the best investment opportunity.
quotes.zh: 当一家优秀企业遇到暂时性巨大困难时，往往是最佳投资机会。

quotes.en: Diversification is protection against ignorance. It makes little sense if you know what you are doing.
quotes.zh: 多元化是对无知的保护。如果你知道自己做什么，它就没有什么意义。

quotes.en: Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful.
quotes.zh: 在别人贪婪时恐惧，在别人恐惧时贪婪。

quotes.en: A brand is a powerful moat. Pricing power is the key advantage.
quotes.zh: 品牌是强大的护城河。定价权是关键优势。

quotes.en: Margin of safety is the key to investment success.
quotes.zh: 安全边际是投资成功的关键。

quotes.en: Be greedy when others are fearful, and fearful when others are greedy.
quotes.zh: 在别人恐慌时贪婪，在别人贪婪时恐慌。

quotes.en: When a fine company encounters temporary difficulties, analyze the real situation deeply.
quotes.zh: 当优秀企业遇到暂时困难时，深入分析真实情况。

quotes.en: Charlie taught me: Buy a wonderful company at a fair price is better than a fair company at a wonderful price.
quotes.zh: 查理教会我：以合理价格买入优秀企业，胜过以便宜价格买入普通企业。

quotes.en: Volatility is not risk. Permanent loss of capital is risk.
quotes.zh: 波动不是风险，永久性资本损失才是风险。

quotes.en: It's far better to buy a wonderful company at a fair price than a fair company at a wonderful price.
quotes.zh: 以合理的价格买入优秀的企业，远胜过以便宜的价格买入普通的企业。

quotes.en: Our favorite holding period is forever.
quotes.zh: 我们最喜欢的持有期是永远。

quotes.en: Capital allocation is the CEO's most important job.
quotes.zh: 资本配置是 CEO 最重要的工作。

quotes.en: Annual reports should serve shareholders, not analysts.
quotes.zh: 年报应该为股东服务，而不是为分析师服务。

quotes.en: Irrational exuberance can last longer than you can remain solvent.
quotes.zh: 非理性繁荣可能持续很久，但我们不会参与。

quotes.en: We'd rather be right and underperform in the short term, than wrong and outperform.
quotes.zh: 我们宁愿被正确但短期表现不佳，也不愿错误但短期表现好。

quotes.en: Invest in businesses you understand. Stay within your circle of competence.
quotes.zh: 投资你理解的企业。待在你的能力圈内。

quotes.en: Options are indeed costs, and they can be significant costs.
quotes.zh: 期权确实是成本，而且是一个重大的成本。

quotes.en: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.
quotes.zh: 价格是你付出的，价值是你得到的。

quotes.en: The key to investing is not assessing how much an industry will affect society, but determining the competitive advantage of any given company.
quotes.zh: 投资的关键不是评估一个行业将对社会产生多大的影响，而是确定任何给定公司的竞争优势。

quotes.en: Risk comes from not knowing what you are doing.
quotes.zh: 风险来自于不知道自己在做什么。

quotes.en: Derivatives are financial weapons of mass destruction.
quotes.zh: 衍生品是大规模杀伤性金融武器。

quotes.en: We only invest in simple and understandable businesses.
quotes.zh: 我们只投资简单易懂的企业。

quotes.en: Only when the tide goes out do you discover who's been swimming naked.
quotes.zh: 当潮水退去，你才知道谁在裸泳。

quotes.en: Be greedy when others are fearful.
quotes.zh: 在别人恐慌时贪婪。

quotes.en: Never bet against America.
quotes.zh: 永远不要做空美国。

quotes.en: The American economic miracle continues.
quotes.zh: 美国的经济奇迹还在继续。

quotes.en: Never bet against America. Our bet is always on America.
quotes.zh: 永远不要做空美国。我们永远押注美国。

quotes.en: In times of crisis, opportunities always exist for the prepared investor.
quotes.zh: 在危机中，机会总是存在的。

quotes.en: Holding cash is also an investment choice. Wait for the right opportunity.
quotes.zh: 持有现金也是投资选择。等待合适的机会。

quotes.en: My Apple stock may fall, but I don't care. I care about Apple's earnings over the next 20 years.
quotes.zh: 我的苹果股票可能会跌，但我不在乎。我在乎的是苹果公司未来 20 年的盈利。

quotes.en: The most important quality in investing is not intelligence, but patience.
quotes.zh: 投资中最重要的品质不是智力，而是耐心。

quotes.en: Just because others agree with you doesn't mean you're right. Just because others disagree doesn't mean you're wrong.
quotes.zh: 别人同意你的观点并不代表你是对的，别人反对也不代表你是错的。

quotes.en: The most important quality in investing is not intelligence, but emotional control.
quotes.zh: 投资中最重要的不是智力，而是情绪控制。

quotes.en: I will go quietly. Greg Abel will do better than me.
quotes.zh: 我会安静地离开。格雷格·阿贝尔会做得比我更好。

quotes.en: I am deeply grateful to Omaha and all shareholders.
quotes.zh: 我对奥马哈和所有股东深表感恩。
